productDisplayName: Fossil Men Black Dial Chronograph Watch CH2754
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case, a stainless steel back and a fixed bezelDial style: Black dial with markings and handsFeatures: Three-faced chronograph display, a date aperture, a screw to reset the time, two push-buttons to adjust the features like alarm and timerStrap style: Black steel bracelet-style strap secured with a butterfly claspWater-resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Fossil caseWarranty: 2-year international warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
